combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
BREAKER BREAKER
BAR • SEAFOOD • BELTLINE PATIO
“Part Time for Life”
HAPPY HOUR SPECIALS WEDNESDAYS / THURSDAYS / SUNDAYS

--- Page: /menu ---
Menu — BREAKER BREAKER
FOOD
DRINKS
Snacks
SPINACH ARTICHOKE DIP
top with lump crab meat
TOMATO BISQUE (CUP)
add a grilled cheese
WARM PRETZEL BITS
w/ Long Haul lager cheese sauce
LUMP CRAB CAKES
w/ cajun slaw & remoulade
Roasted beet hummus
w/ chili crisp &  assorted crudités
CHICKEN WINGS (6)
hot lemon pepper or honey garlic
SHRIMP COCKTAIL
chilled jumbos, cocktail sauce
Baskets
served with fries
CHICKEN TENDIES
FRIED SHRIMP
FISH & CHIPS
All Day
choice of protein, rice, cabbage, sweet potatoes, avocado, feta, pumpkin seeds, chili crisp
BREAKER BOWL
grouper / shrimp / chicken
choice of protein, rice, cabbage, sweet potatoes, avocado, feta, pumpkin seeds, chili crisp
CAPTAIN'S PLATTER
beer battered Atlantic cod, fried shrimp, hush puppies, french fries, cajun slaw, dipping sauces
served w
/
old way oyster crackers
N.E. CLAM CHOWDER
cup / bowl
served w
/
old way oyster crackers
Sandwiches
comes w/ Zapp's chips
LOBSTER ROLL
1/4 lb. lobster, warm butter, chives, toasted split top bun
BEER BATTERED COD
cajun slaw, tartar sauce
CHICKEN CAESAR WRAP
roast chicken, dressed kale, garlic breadcrumbs, pickled peppers
LOUNGE BURGER
1/2 lb. chuck & sirloin patty, american cheese, grilled onion, pickles
FRIED SHRIMP PO'BOY
shredded lettuce, tomato, pickles, tartar sauce, cocktail sauce
CHICKEN TENDIE PUB SUB
american, shredded lettuce, tomato, pickles, gouchujang mayo
ROAST CHICKEN CLUB
crispy bacon, shredded lettuce, tomato, salsa verde, mayo
Salads
KALE CAESAR
Anchovy Dressing, Garlic Breadcrumbs
CABBAGE & CRISPY RICE SALAD
carrot, kale, avocado, orange sections, crispy rice, herbs, pepitas, vinaigrette
roasted chicken or chicken tendies
Add a Protein:
shrimp or grouper
roasted chicken or chicken tendies
After 5pm
STEAK FRITES
6 oz. sirloin cap, peppercorn cream sauce, french fries
SEAFOOD PASTA
fresh pappardelle, lobster, crab & shrimp, lemon garlic cream sauce, parm
white wine caper sauce, fresh pappardelle
PICCATA
chicken / grouper / roasted cauliflower
white wine caper sauce, fresh pappardelle
Kids
served with chips & juice box
CHICKEN TENDIES
FRIED SHRIMP
GRILLED CHEESE
Dessert
ROTATES DAILY
Frozen Cocktails
BELTLINE BARBIE
aperol, blue coat gin, prosecco, grapefruit juice
LARGE MARGE
blood orange margarita
House Cocktails
DON DRAPER
dirty martini (murrels row gin or tito's vodka)
CAR RAMROD (several hot)
maple bourbon hot toddy
ICE ROAD TRUCKER
espresso martini, pistachio foam
VAYA CON DIOS (SPICY)
tanteo habanero tequila, passion fruit liqueur, lime juice
LOT LIZARD SPRITZ
limoncello, basil, bubbles, soda
Draft Beer
LongHaul Lager
Sierra Nevada Hazy
Sierra Nevada Sunny
Dos Equis Amber
Genesee
High Life
Dos Equis (16 oz)
Twisted Tea Light
Peach State Lite
Terrapin Luau IPA
Allagash White
Classic City Lager
High Noon
Wine
HAMPTON WATER ROSE (7 OZ. CUP)
ARCHER ROOSE (8.5 OZ CAN)
BOTA BOX (17 OZ CARAFE)
ARCHER ROOSE (8.5 OZ CAN)

meta.meta_description:
Take a Little Time Off at Break Breaker. Bar, Seafood & Patio Hangs on the 
Atlanta Beltline. Established 2023.
